title: Leftie Sickles
description:
Turns swords into sickles, including rose themed variants.

Rose themed variants have custom slash particle.

Is a bit different position-wise on your right hand, sorry first time messing with those positions!
body:
# Sickles!!
This resource pack replaces swords with sickles, maintaining a vanilla friendly style. As of now, only swords have been changed, but in the future I want to add an axe option. 
This pack also comes with a rose themed variant, which also comes with custom sweeping particles.
**If you download this, thank you, as this is probably my best pack yet. Have fun!**
